prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组（含理科/物理类）最低位次依次约5942→7594→12114→22084→11543名，2024年因新高考首年出现大幅后移至约22084名，2025年显著回升至约11543名，近3年波动剧烈，2025年基准约11543名；本省理科组计划2021年33人、2022年31人、2023年32人、2024年39人、2025年41人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划44人，较2025年再扩招约7.3%，扩招幅度加大，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第82–84名区间（2026年第82名），属于全国中上游水平；2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学获评A++等级）；2026年声誉转为偏负面，涉及宿舍火灾等校园安全事件，可能对报考心理产生一定抑制作用；抖音热度排名第11（高热），短视频曝光量高，关注度持续旺盛；新闻传播学为A+学科（全国顶尖），与该校传媒特色高度一致，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力；其余学科未获A-及以上评级，整体学科精度集中于传媒领域。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年高热推荐），与该校物理类招生专业高度相关；新闻传播类专业2023年明显劝退（张雪峰效应），但2025年声誉回升；广西2026年高考总报名约39.2万人，按近年物理类占比约68.6%估算约26.9万人，较2025年增加约8500人，竞争加剧；省控线2025年物理类本科批370分，近年保持平稳；中国传媒大学位于北京，对广西考生属跨省报考；该校在广西理科组招生人数占比较小（约41–44人），地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回升至约11543名的基准、2026年计划扩招约7.3%带来的竞争加剧效应、广西物理类考生增加约8500人导致整体竞争升温、以及2026年声誉偏负面可能抑制部分报考意愿，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约12100名，区间11600–12600名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for the science group (including science/physics category) were approximately 5942 → 7594 → 12114 → 22084 → 11543. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance exam, there was a significant drop to about 22084, but in 2025 it rebounded to about 11543. The fluctuations over the past 3 years have been severe, with the 2025 baseline at about 11543. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 33 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 39 in 2024, and 41 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 44, an expansion of about 7.3% compared to 2025, with an increased expansion rate, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In recent years, the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been stable in the 82–84 range (82nd in 2026), placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2025, the reputation was relatively positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++). In 2026, the reputation turned negative, involving campus safety incidents such as dormitory fires, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 11th (high heat), with high short video exposure and sustained strong attention. Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly consistent with the university's media characteristics, and has strong appeal for related majors. Other disciplines have not received A- or above ratings, and the overall disciplinary precision is concentrated in the media field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continue to have high social popularity (highly recommended in 2024), closely related to the university's physics category enrollment majors. Journalism and Communication majors were clearly discouraged in 2023 (Zhang Xuefeng effect), but reputation recovered in 2025. The total number of Guangxi college entrance exam registrants in 2026 is about 392,000, with an estimated physics category proportion of about 68.6%, approximately 269,000, an increase of about 8,500 compared to 2025, intensifying competition. The provincial control line for the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch is 370 points, remaining stable in recent years. Communication University of China is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Guangxi candidates. The university's enrollment in Guangxi's science group is relatively small (about 41–44 people), so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 ranking rebound to about 11543 as the baseline, the 2026 plan expansion of about 7.3% leading to intensified competition, the increase of about 8,500 physics category candidates in Guangxi causing overall competition to heat up, and the negative reputation in 2026 potentially suppressing some application willingness, it is expected that the lowest ranking in 2026 will continue to slightly decline from the 2025 level. The predicted lowest ranking is about 12100, with a range of 11600–12600.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Digital Media Technology
- Artificial Intelligence (Intelligent Audiovisual Excellence Talent Experimental Class)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Advertising (Computational Advertising Dual Degree Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Communication Engineering
- Network Space Security
- Communication Studies (Intelligent and Computational Communication Direction)
- Intelligent Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Information Management and Information Systems
- Digital Economy
- Cultural Industry Management
- Administrative Management (Media and Public Governance Direction)
- Business Administration (Intelligent Business Management Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11600–12600, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Communication, Network Space Security) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Digital Media Technology, Computer Science and Technology) as sprint options, and Tier 3 majors (Information Management and Information Systems, Digital Economy, etc.) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 11600), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science China University Ranking has been stable in the 82–84 range in recent years (82nd in 2026), placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2026, the reputation turned negative due to campus safety incidents such as dormitory fires, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline (top nationally), highly related to the university's liberal arts group enrollment majors such as Journalism, Network and New Media, and Advertising, exerting strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.text: Journalism and Communication majors were clearly discouraged in 2023, but in 2025, after the university's Journalism and Communication was rated A++, its reputation rebounded. 预测结论.text: Based on the baseline of the ranking rebounding to about 1622 in 2025, the intensified competition effect from the 11.8% enrollment expansion in 2026, the overall competition heating up due to an increase of about 3,900 history category candidates in Guangxi, and the negative reputation in 2026 possibly suppressing some application willingness, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline.
